title: Realtime Chat App with Multi-Channel Support and Rich Media

statement.markdown:
## Projects Challenge: Realtime Chat App with Multi-Channel Support and Rich Media

Your objective is to build a fully functional, highly interactive React component representing the target design mockup.

### 🎨 Color Palette
* `#C06C88`
* `#090a0f`
* `#B7D7CD`

### 📐 Target Design Mockup
Use the visual mockup shown in the panel to guide your coordinate alignment, container proportions, and spacing.

### 📌 Target Design SVG Source
The target geometry is defined by the following SVG vector graphic (viewable by the LLM judge):
```xml
<svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' width='400' height='300'>
<g fill='#C06C88' transform='translate(20,20)'>
  <rect x='0' y='0' width='360' height='260' rx='10'/>
  <circle cx='190' cy='120' r='90'/>
  <text x='150' y='120' text-anchor='middle' font-size='24' font-family='Arial'>Chat App</text>
</g>
<g fill='#090a0f' transform='translate(50,50)'>
  <rect x='10' y='10' width='80' height='20' rx='5'/> <!-- Channel 1 -->
  <rect x='110' y='10' width='80' height='20' rx='5'/> <!-- Channel 2 -->
  <rect x='210' y='10' width='80' height='20' rx='5'/> <!-- Channel 3 -->
  <text x='120' y='25' text-anchor='middle' font-size='14' font-family='Arial'>#Chat</text>
  <text x='220' y='25' text-anchor='middle' font-size='14' font-family='Arial'>#Discussion</text>
</g>
<g fill='#B7D7CD' transform='translate(70,80)'>
  <rect x='10' y='0' width='60' height='10'/>
  <rect x='70' y='0' width='60' height='10'/>
  <rect x='130' y='0' width='60' height='10'/>
  <text x='60' y='15' text-anchor='middle' font-size='12' font-family='Arial'>Typing...</text>
</g>
</svg>
```

### ⚙️ Requirements
1. Match the visual presentation (layout, alignment, borders, colors) of the mockup.
2. Implement all necessary React state variables, event handlers, and input bindings to make the page interactive.
3. Make sure all interactive controls (buttons, forms, checkboxes, sliders) update the view correctly.

constraints: Must use only specified colors and SVG design elements.
Must be fully interactive with state updates, channel switching, and typing indicator system.
Must render perfectly within a 400x300 viewport.

referenceAssets.caption: Recreate target design: Realtime Chat App with Multi-Channel Support and Rich Media

gradingCriteria.description: Evaluate how closely the layout, colors, and positioning match the target visual mockup.
Verify interactive state updates, channel switching, typing indicator system, and handlers.
Review code complexity, performance, and handling of multiple states.
